meta.title: Cashback calculator — Loop
meta.description: See how much cashback you would earn on any merchant. Pick a store, enter an amount — Loop pays cashback in LOOP-asset stablecoin pinned 1:1 to your home currency.

calculator.heading: Cashback calculator
calculator.sub: Pick a merchant and see what you’d earn on Loop — paid in LOOP-asset stablecoin you can spend on your next order.
calculator.noMerchants: No merchants available right now. Check back shortly.

index.heading: Best cashback rates on Loop
index.sub: Earn cashback every time you buy a gift card. Paid in LOOP-asset stablecoin that compounds when you spend it on your next order.
index.loadError: Couldn’t load the cashback list. Please refresh.
index.empty: No merchants with cashback configured yet — check back soon.

howItWorks.heading: How Loop cashback works
howItWorks.step1: Pick a merchant and buy a gift card — pay in XLM, USDC, or your LOOP balance.
howItWorks.step2: Cashback lands in LOOP-asset stablecoin (USDLOOP / GBPLOOP / EURLOOP), pinned 1:1 to your home currency.
howItWorks.step3: Spend LOOP on your next order. Cashback from order #1 pays for order #2 — the flywheel.

meta.title: Cashback at {{name}} — Loop
meta.description: Earn cashback on {{name}} gift cards with Loop. Paid in LOOP-asset stablecoin — recycle it into more orders for compounding rewards.

errorBoundary.body: We couldn't load this merchant. Try again in a minute.

notFound.heading: {{name}} isn’t on Loop
notFound.bodyPrefix: We couldn’t find a merchant with slug
notFound.bodySuffix: . Browse the full catalog to see what’s available.

hero.heading: Cashback at {{name}}
hero.comingSoon: {{name}} is coming soon — sign up to be notified when cashback goes live.

howItWorks.heading: How cashback compounds on Loop
howItWorks.step1: Buy a gift card and pay with XLM, USDC, or your existing LOOP-asset balance.
howItWorks.step2: Earn cashback in LOOP-asset stablecoin (USDLOOP / GBPLOOP / EURLOOP), pinned 1:1 to your home currency.
howItWorks.step3: Spend that LOOP-asset balance on your next order. The cashback you earned on this purchase pays for the next one — flywheel.
